summary.authoritative_rule: the add frontier should keep a post-wave echo guard and shift its next supervision layer to active-wave daily selection rather than continuing generic portability tuning

triage_rows.rationale: late strong local echoes can already be separated from true add-wave days using recent order-flow state
after removing post-wave echoes, the residual blocker is deciding which symbol gets selected inside a live add wave
the branch still lacks a justified same-wave daily ranking layer, so execution and broader promotion remain blocked

interpretation: V1.34FS turns the wave-state split into the next governance verdict for the add frontier.
The frontier no longer needs to confuse late echoes with same-wave competition; its remaining blocker is now narrowly the active-wave selection problem.
